{{Quote|My son is the captain of this vessel.|Vikar Dorn|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 13">[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]]</ref>}}
'''Dorn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. He was the son of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Vikar Dorn]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] and the commanding officer of the [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']]. In [[137 ABY]], he and his crew pretended to defect to [[Roan Fel]]'s [[Empire-in-exile|faction]] of the Galactic Empire based in the planet [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. The defection was part of a plot devised by [[Darth Maladi]], head of [[Sith Intelligence and Assassination]] to allow the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Kruhl]] to infiltrate the [[Imperial Headquarters]] and [[Duel on Bastion|assassinate]] [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Fel. After Lord Kruhl failed and the plot was exposed, Dorn and his entire crew were [[Dauntless crew killing|executed]].
